title: Life coach talks at WRRA meeting
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Wilderness Ratepayers and...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Wilderness Ratepayers and Residents Association would like to invite the public to an inspirational talk by Henrico Hanekom titled 'Psychedelics - substance or sacrament'.


> Hanekom's talk about visionary plants is insightful to both the expert and the curious.


Hanekom wants to inspire people in their own personal growth.

He is a life coach, hypnosis practitioner, past life regression therapist and has many more healer qualifications.

The meeting will be held on Wednesday 14 August at 18:00 for 18:30 at the Fairy Knowe Hotel, 1 Dumbleton Road, Wilderness.

For more information, contact [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
